issueDatetime.description: The date and time the option grant was issued.

quantity.description: The number of shares reserved from the equity plan share reserve.

stockOptionType.description: The tax classification of the option grant. Determines the tax treatment based on the jurisdiction and plan type. See `StockOptionType` for all supported values.

exercisePrice.description: The per-share price at which the holder can purchase the underlying shares.

equityPlanId.description: The identifier of the equity plan from which the option grant was issued.

shareClassId.description: The identifier of the share class. May be absent if the plan has no associated share class.

expirationDatetime.description: The date and time the option grant expires.

vestingScheduleTemplateId.description: The identifier of the vesting schedule template. May be absent if the grant has no vesting schedule.

schema_def.description: The issuance transaction for an option grant. Represents the initial grant of options.
